conclusions.research_question: Do simple systematic alpha signals survive costs, out-of-sample testing, robustness checks, and market stress?
conclusions.headline: Of five signals, 3 survived, 1 was conditional, and 1 was rejected — discipline, not a single best backtest, separates them.
key_findings: Time-Series Momentum: Survived (net Sharpe 0.57, max DD -15.3%).
Cross-Sectional Momentum: Survived (net Sharpe 0.62, max DD -18.4%).
Short-Term Reversal: Rejected (net Sharpe 0.45, max DD -29.1%).
Volatility-Scaled Momentum: Conditional (net Sharpe 0.58, max DD -11.8%).
Equal-Weight Signal Ensemble: Survived (net Sharpe 0.59, max DD -21.8%).
